purpose: RealVisXL separated-hand robustness profile using a small-book contact pose to test object contact, finger wrapping, and sleeve boundaries.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic editorial portrait of an adult subject seated at a simple wooden table, both hands separated and visible while lightly holding a small closed notebook flat on the tabletop, fingers gently resting along opposite edges of the notebook, natural finger spacing, ten readable fingers, accurate knuckles, fingernails, wrists, and palm planes, clean sleeve cuffs ending above the wrists, realistic contact shadows under fingers and notebook, textured tailored jacket fabric, natural facial asymmetry, lifelike eyes, realistic skin pores, soft studio window lighting, realistic shadows, 70mm portrait lens, photographic color grading
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, CGI, doll-like face, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed texture, clasped hands, interlocked fingers, folded hands, hidden hands, cropped hands, deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, webbed fingers, duplicated thumb, broken wrist, twisted wrist, distorted nails, melted fingertips, warped sleeves, cloth melting into skin, notebook melting into fingers, object fused with hand, bad anatomy, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, logo

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Tests a slightly harder but explicit object-contact hand pose with separated hands on opposite notebook edges.
